blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 56 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Wednesday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

Saturday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 40".
